summary: FCT_TRADES shows duplicate trades for some accounts after nightly load
description: After the nightly CTM_LOAD_FCT_TRADES job runs LOAD_FCT_TRADES, a small number of accounts show duplicate rows in FCT_TRADES for the same TRADE_ID. Downstream VW_DAILY_POSITIONS therefore double-counts NET_QUANTITY for those accounts. Started after the latest DIM_ACCOUNT SCD load. No new columns or behavior were requested - existing data is simply wrong.

triage.rationale: Existing production data is incorrect — duplicate TRADE_ID rows in FCT_TRADES caused by a missing IS_CURRENT = TRUE filter in LOAD_FCT_TRADES when joining DIM_ACCOUNT, leading to double-counted NET_QUANTITY in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS; no new scope is requested.

impacted_objects.name: FCT_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: named in summary; duplicate rows are being inserted into this fact table

impacted_objects.name: LOAD_FCT_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: root-cause object: joins DIM_ACCOUNT without WHERE IS_CURRENT = TRUE, causing one staging trade row to match multiple DIM_ACCOUNT versions and fan out into duplicates

impacted_objects.name: DIM_ACCOUNT
impacted_objects.why: SCD-2 dimension with IS_CURRENT flag; referenced in LOAD_FCT_TRADES join without the IS_CURRENT filter; latest SCD load introduced multiple IS_CURRENT rows triggering the defect

impacted_objects.name: VW_DAILY_POSITIONS
impacted_objects.why: downstream consumer of FCT_TRADES; SUM aggregates on QUANTITY and NET_AMOUNT are double-counted for affected accounts

impacted_objects.name: CTM_LOAD_FCT_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: Control-M job that invokes LOAD_FCT_TRADES nightly; the defective run is scheduled via this job

approval.notes: Approved as-is via Jarvis SME gate. All 5 changes authorized; deploy order 1->2->4->3->5.
